use_cases: Hero section decorative animation with continuously morphing shapes
Landing page visual accent that cycles through geometric forms
Loading state alternative with engaging shape transitions
Brand or logo animation effect for memorable visual identity
Interactive storytelling element that draws user attention
ai_summary: A continuously animated SVG component that smoothly morphs between geometric shapes (star, heart, hand) using flubber path interpolation and motion/react for smooth transitions. The component features animated fill colors and runs on an automated loop, making it ideal for decorative hero sections, engaging loading states, or attention-grabbing visual accents on landing pages and marketing sites.
